§6Mortar and Pestle§f

§aGrind spices, grains, and make marzipan!§f

The §bMortar and Pestle§f is a manual grinding utensil used to process grains into flour, spices into powders, and craft specialty foods like marzipan and mochi.

§6Crafting§f: §e3× Stone§f + §e1× Stick§f.

§6Grinding Recipes§f:
§b• Grains§f (Barley, Oats, Rye, Corn, Wheat) → §e2× Flour§f.
§b• Peppercorn§f → §bBlack Pepper§f.
§b• Cinnamon§f → §bGround Cinnamon§f.
§b• Nutmeg§f → §bGround Nutmeg§f.
§b• Cocoa Beans§f → §bCocoa Powder§f.

§6Specialty Crafts§f:
§b• Marzipan§f: §bHoney§f + §bAlmonds§f.
§b• Mochi§f: §bRice§f + §bSugar§f.

§6Usage§f:
§9Place the Mortar and Pestle§f in a crafting grid with the source ingredient. The Mortar and Pestle is reusable and does not get consumed. Most recipes yield §e2× output§f per input.

§6Comparison§f:
The Mortar and Pestle and the §bGrinder§f overlap on grain → flour, but the Grinder also handles raw meat → ground meat and is more powerful overall. The Mortar and Pestle's unique value is its spice and cocoa processing, plus Marzipan/Mochi.

§eTip§f: Use the Mortar and Pestle early-game for flour production. Once you upgrade to a §bGrinder§f, repurpose it for cocoa processing and specialty crafts.
